creator: mauro@eldritch.com.ar
text:
Created attachment 160882
A patch that adds me as a maintainer.

Hello. I would like to adopt the port security/ADMsmb (Samba security scanner).

I attach a patch that adds me as a maintainer, if you accept my adoption.

The port itself is healthy and has no issues at all and appears to be up-to-date.

Thanks.

Mauro.
